rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions in component type annexes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output bindings with existing output features.
Generate boolean range expressions using declared variables matching AADL data types.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be syntactically valid within annex agree blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference only visible identifiers from the AADL model.
Component type contracts use component ports; implementation contracts use subcomponent bindings.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq declarations for boolean range checks: eq var : bool = expr.
Place all AGREE annex content inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integer comparisons.
